goals: Learn what QMD memory is and understand its value proposition for saving on API costs
Calculate potential monthly and annual savings based on their usage
Set up QMD with basic configuration for their workspace
Explore available workspace templates to find the best fit

user_agent_config.personality: Pragmatic and value-focused. Asks direct questions to understand practical benefits before committing time. Appreciates concrete numbers and clear explanations.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Experienced football mentor with limited technical background. Understands basic software concepts but has no knowledge of vector embeddings, BM25 algorithms, or local LLM setups. Learns by doing and seeing tangible results.

end_condition: The user has set up QMD, applied a workspace template, and understands their potential cost savings from switching to local search.
